schemes.name: PM-KISAN
schemes.eligibility: All landholding farmer families with cultivable land
schemes.how_to_apply: Visit pmkisan.gov.in or nearest CSC center
schemes.documents: Aadhaar card, Bank account, Land records

schemes.name: PMFBY
schemes.eligibility: All farmers growing notified crops in notified areas
schemes.how_to_apply: Through bank/CSC center before sowing deadline
schemes.documents: Land records, Sowing certificate, Bank account, Aadhaar

schemes.name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC)
schemes.benefit: Short-term crop loans at 4% interest (with prompt repayment). Up to ₹3 lakh.
schemes.eligibility: All farmers, tenant farmers, sharecroppers, SHG members
schemes.how_to_apply: Apply at nearest bank branch with land documents
schemes.documents: Land records, Identity proof, Passport photos

schemes.name: PM-KUSUM
schemes.full_name: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Urja Suraksha evam Utthan Mahabhiyan
schemes.benefit: 60% subsidy on solar pumps (up to 7.5 HP). Earn from surplus solar power.
schemes.eligibility: Individual farmers, farmer groups, cooperatives, panchayats
schemes.how_to_apply: Through state DISCOM or agriculture department

schemes.name: Soil Health Card
schemes.benefit: Free soil testing with recommendations for fertilizer use
schemes.how_to_apply: Visit nearest KVK or Soil Testing Lab

schemes.name: MKSP
schemes.benefit: Training, resources, and support for women farmers
